nodes.context: Salvadoran drug trafficking cartel active from 1990s to 2018, transported drugs from Colombia through El Salvador to North America.
Salvadoran criminal street gang hired by Texis Cartel for intimidation and killings.
Salvadoran criminal street gang hired by Texis Cartel for intimidation and killings.
Drug trafficking group in El Salvador that received protection from Salvadoran government officials alongside Texis Cartel.
Colombian cartels that manufactured drugs transported by Texis Cartel.
Mexican cartels that Texis Cartel worked with, offering services to whichever group paid.

edges.context: Texis Cartel hired MS-13 gang members to intimidate and kill opponents if necessary.
Texis Cartel hired 18th Street gang members to intimidate and kill opponents if necessary.
Both groups received protection from Salvadoran government officials according to UN in 2011.
Texis Cartel transported drugs manufactured by Colombian cartels through El Salvador.
Texis Cartel worked with Mexican drug cartels, offering services to whichever group paid.
